1. 1
  2. 2
  3. 3
  4. 4

Welcome to Sidevers

Sidevers is a peer-to-peer protocol for talking to the people you've chosen to talk to, without a server in the middle. Each identity you create here is a self-sovereign "side" — your keys, your data, your reach.

Three steps: pick where Sidevers stores your data, save a recovery file in case you lose this device, then you're done. We'll create your personal side automatically.

Pick a data directory

Sidevers persists your keys, your inbox, and your peer table here. The default is OS-appropriate. Make sure it's somewhere your OS-level disk encryption covers. 



        

          
Save a recovery file

          

            If you lose this device, the only way to bring this identity
            back is the file we save now plus a passphrase you set now.
            You can also do this later from Settings → Backup.
          


          

            
            
            
          


          

            
            
          


          

            
            
            
          


          

            
            
          


          

          


          

            
            
          

        


        

          
You're set up

          

            Your side address is below. Hand it to someone you'd like
            to message, or pair your phone with this device from the
            main UI to host the same identity in two places.
          

          

            
            
          

          

            
          

        

      

    


    
    


      
      

        
    
        
    
        
    
          
          
        
    
      
    

      
      
    
        
    
          
    
            —
            No side
          
    
          
        
    

        
    
          
    Friends
    
          
      
          
        
      

        
      
          
      Chats
      
          
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
        Pick a chat or add a friend
        
            
        
              Friends and chats appear on the left for the side you're
              in. Switch sides on the far-left rail. Or:
            
        
            
        
              
              
              
            
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            —
            
        
              —
              
            
        
            
        
              
            
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
              
              
              
              
              
            
        
            
            
        
              
              0:00
              Recording…
              
              
            
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            
            
        Friend
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
        —
        
              
        
                —
              
        
            
        
            
        
              
        Profile
        
              
        No profile published yet.
        
              
        
            
        
            
        
              
        Local settings
        
              
        
                These only affect this device. Capabilities here override
                the friend's published profile for what you'll accept.
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
            
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            
            
        Add a friend
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
              
            
        

            
            
        
              
        
                Show this code to whoever you want to message. They scan it
                or paste it into "Add by code" on their end. The code carries
                your side address + network endpoint — no secrets.
              
        
              
        
                
        
                
        
                  
                  
                
        
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              
        
                Paste a friend code (starts with sidevers-contact:1:)
                or scan the friend's QR. We'll save them as a friend on the
                active side.
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
            
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            
            
        Side settings
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
        
                Photo
              
        
              
        
                Pick an image to represent this side. Stored locally on this
                device for now; friends still see your initials until profile
                photos travel on the wire.
              
        
              
        
                
        
                  —
                
        
                
        
                  
                  
                  
                
        
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        
                Profile (published)
              
        
              
        
                Friends see this when they fetch your side. Edits sign +
                publish from this side; nothing leaves the device until you
                hit Save.
              
        
              
        
                
                
                
                  Letters, numbers, dots, dashes, underscores · up to 32 chars · not unique yet
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        
                Protocol info
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        
                Danger zone
              
        
              
        
                Retiring signs a SideRetirement record. Peers will start
                treating new envelopes from this side as anomalous. You
                can still receive replies for a while; you can't undo it.
              
        
              
        
                
              
        
            
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            
            
        Settings
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
        
                Appearance
              
        
              
        
                
        
                  Theme
                  
                    Stays in sync with the OS by default.
                  
                
        
                
              
        
              
        
                
        
                  Language
                  
                    UI strings; Arabic switches to RTL.
                  
                
        
                
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        
                Advanced
              
        
              
        
                
        
                  
                    Show protocol details
                  
                  
                    Reveals bech32 addresses, lifecycle states, and the
                    Network / Pair-device / Protocol pages.
                  
                
        
                
              
        
              
        
                
        
                  
                    Advanced pages
                  
                  
                    Network, pair another device, raw protocol controls.
                  
                
        
                
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        
                Backup
              
        
              
        
                Export the active side's seed file, encrypted with a
                passphrase. The file lands in your data directory under
                backups/; copy it to a USB stick or
                password vault. Anyone with both the file and the
                passphrase can impersonate this side.
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        Updates
        
              
        
                Sidevers checks GitHub Releases for newer signed builds.
                Updates are verified against the release signing key before
                they install.
              
        
              
        
                
        
                  
                    Click below to check for updates.
                  
                  
                
        
                
              
        
              
        
                
              
        
            
        

            
        
              
        About
        
              
        
                Sidevers reference client — peer-to-peer messaging without a server.
              
        
              
        
                Version 0.1.1
              
        
            
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            
            
        Advanced
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
        
                Pair another device
              
        
              
        
                Show this QR on your existing device, scan it on a new one
                to install this side there too. Both devices co-host the
                same identity. The QR is a 10-minute one-time code.
              
        
              
        
                
        
                
        
                  
                  
                
        
              
        
              
        
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
              
        
            
        
            
        
              
        
                Dial a peer manually
              
        
              
        
                Open a session to a peer's network endpoint from the active
                side. The chat-first UI does this for you when you click a
                friend; this is an escape hatch when you only have an
                endpoint, not a friend record.
